name: writhing_stalker.live_no_omniscient_beeline_mcw
description: Live writhing-stalker no-omniscience negative control: install a harness-only noon/no-human-target fixture with one saved active writhing stalker behind a thick opaque wall, guard saved noon/NPC/stalker/wall footing, advance a live turn window, require target_probe no-target/no-sight lines, require no target=yes/no live_plan latch lines, then save/audit same-run active-monster distance.

steps.label: post_load_clean_no_evidence_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the harness-only clean no-evidence McWilliams fixture loads to the normal live map with the stalker already present in saved active_monsters

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_no_evidence_window
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove local noon before the no-evidence writhing-stalker negative-control window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn metadata proves the fixture is at local noon, so the negative control has no night-light lure

steps.label: audit_saved_no_human_npcs_before_no_evidence_window
steps.abort_reason: installed save still contained overmap NPC human targets before the no-evidence writhing-stalker negative-control window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-overmap metadata proves no NPC human target remains in the fixture before the negative-control window

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_no_evidence_window
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not contain exactly the intended mon_writhing_stalker footing before the no-evidence live window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters metadata proves one hostile mon_writhing_stalker is staged at a known plausible distance behind the opaque wall before live turns advance

steps.label: audit_saved_opaque_wall_before_no_evidence_window
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove the thick opaque locker wall between player and stalker
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-map metadata proves a thick opaque locker wall stands between the player and the staged writhing stalker before live turns advance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_no_evidence_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off before the no-evidence turn window so any turn advancement is not consumed by a safe-mode warning prompt

steps.label: advance_clean_no_evidence_negative_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: a live turn window runs with a staged stalker, no human/NPC target, noon lighting, and a thick opaque wall; proof depends on same-run target_probe no-target/no-sight lines plus forbidden-line guards
steps.failure_rule: if the artifact delta lacks no-target/no-sight target_probe lines or contains target=yes/sees_player=yes/live_plan lines, this negative control is red rather than green

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_no_evidence_target_probe
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain writhing-stalker target_probe lines proving no target and no player sight during the negative window
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the live monster-plan target acquisition phase saw no target and no direct player sight for the staged stalker

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_no_evidence_no_target_or_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact contained a target/sight/live_plan line despite the clean no-evidence/no-human/no-sight setup
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact contains no target=yes, no sees_player=yes, and no writhing_stalker live_plan line, proving the no-evidence setup did not create a magic latch, shadow, beeline, strike, or cooldown refresh

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_writhing_stalker_no_evidence_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the no-evidence negative window and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_writhing_stalker_no_evidence_window
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the writhing-stalker no-evidence save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the no-evidence live window; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_writhing_stalker_no_evidence_window
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_writhing_stalker_no_evidence_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the writhing-stalker no-evidence save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed writhing-stalker no-evidence save, proving the following active_monsters audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_after_no_evidence_scene
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain a mon_writhing_stalker still at least four map squares from the player after the no-evidence window
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved active_monsters metadata contains the live writhing stalker still away from the player after the no-evidence/no-latch window

evidence_contract.claim: a writhing stalker can exist nearby in a plausible cluttered/noon setup with no direct sight, no night-light lure, no NPC/human target, and no player-produced clue without creating an instant omniscient target, latch, beeline, strike, or cooldown refresh
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses harness-only game_turn, remove-overmap-NPC, active_monsters, and opaque furniture save transforms plus saved-turn/NPC/stalker/map-tile audits before live turns; it does not synthesize stalker AI state, player vulnerability, night light, fields, lamps, or human evidence
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker no-omniscience behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No no-omniscience credit if startup/load, saved noon guard, no-human-target guard, saved active-monster footing, saved opaque-wall guard, safe-mode-off live turn window, same-run no-target target_probe lines, forbidden target/live-plan absence, save/writeback, and active-monster distance metadata are not all present and classified separately.
